title: Second-Year Bosnian/Croatian/Montenegrin/Serbian
catalogDescription: Continuation of BCMS 401, BCMS 402, BCMS 403; reinforces basic grasp of language and enlarges both vocabulary and command of grammatical patterns through the reading of contemporary short stories in Bosnian, Croatian, Montenegrin, and Serbian. Third in a sequence of three. Prerequisite: minimum grade of 2.0 in BCMS 405. Offered: Sp.
prerequisiteNotes: Official UW prerequisite text: minimum grade of 2.0 in BCMS 405.
prerequisite text is preserved as a note until a parser can safely normalize AND/OR/minimum-grade semantics into graph prerequisites.

title: Intensive Third Year Bosnian/Croatian/Montenegrin/Serbian
catalogDescription: Advanced grammatical exercises and listening, reading, and writing skills development. Emphasis on strengthening of conversational and presentational competence. Prerequisite: BCMS 406 Offered: A.

title: Literature, Film, and Culture of the Former Yugoslavia and the Yugoslav Successor States
catalogDescription: A travelogue through the intellectual and cultural landscape of the former Yugoslavia and the Yugoslav successor states, studying select literary works, films, and other artifacts, with the exploration of both how these phenomena are a part of their intellectual and historical environment, and how they transcend and change it.
